Document:
# Snails
Snails are slow, small, and surprisingly durable molluscs that have made themselves at home aboard the station. They cannot speak, but they can emote, and their presence is known to inspire existential reflection in some crew members.
As a snail you are [bold]tiny[/bold], able to fit into small spaces and largely ignored by the crew unless you make yourself known. You are [bold]harmless[/bold] and have no way to attack.
Be careful around [color=yellow]salt[/color] — contact with salt or saline solutions will [bold]hurt you[/bold].
## Variants
- [bold]Snail[/bold] — a standard garden snail that found its way onto a space station. Moves slowly. Has a rich inner life. - [bold]Speed Snail[/bold] — a snail of unusual velocity. Do not underestimate it. - [bold]Snoth[/bold] — part snail, part moth. The genetics lab strikes again. Can fit into moth-sized spaces and has a unique appearance.
